fileStorage.heading: File Storage
fileStorage.autoSaveHint: Automatically store files in on-device storage for later access
fileStorage.showSamplesHint: Keep the bundled sample log in your file browser
fileStorage.showSamplesLocked: Add a file of your own to hide the sample

speedUnit.heading: Speed Unit
speedUnit.label: Display speed in kilometers per hour

distanceUnit.heading: Distance Unit
distanceUnit.label: Track length, lap distance & chart distance axis

weatherUnits.heading: Weather Units
weatherUnits.label: Temperature, wind, pressure & altitude
weatherUnits.hint: Imperial = °F, mph, inHg, ft · Metric = °C, km/h, hPa, m

gforceSmoothing.heading: G-Force Smoothing
gforceSmoothing.label: Apply noise reduction to calculated G-forces

gforceSource.heading: G-Force Source
gforceSource.label: G-force data source for simple chart
gforceSource.hint: GPS = derived from speed/heading, HW = hardware accelerometer

lapDelta.heading: Lap Delta
lapDelta.label: Gap-to-reference calculation
lapDelta.hint: Position projects your line onto the reference (robust to line & GPS-rate differences); Distance is the legacy cumulative-distance method

chartScale.heading: Chart Scale
chartScale.label: Telemetry chart X-axis
chartScale.hint: Distance plots against track position so laps line up corner-for-corner; Time plots against elapsed lap time

braking.heading: Braking Zone Detection
braking.intro: Tune the detection algorithm for identifying braking zones on the map.
braking.graphSmoothingHint: Savitzky-Golay filter window for the Brake % chart. Larger = smoother.
braking.brakeMaxHint: The deceleration G-force that maps to 100% brake. Lower = more sensitive.

fieldVisibility.heading: Default Field Visibility
fieldVisibility.intro: Choose which data fields are visible by default when loading a file. Hidden fields can still be enabled manually.

appUpdate.heading: App Update
appUpdate.label: Force update & clear cache
appUpdate.hint: Clears cached app files and reloads the latest version. Your saved sessions and data in the Garage are not affected.

mychron.heading: MyChron
mychron.ssidPrefixHint: The start of your MyChron's Wi-Fi name. When you download, the system Wi-Fi picker only lists networks that begin with this. It is case-sensitive — change it only if your logger broadcasts a different name.
